articles.author: Rod McGuirk
articles.title: Australian woman held in custody on charges of traveling to Syria to join Islamic State group - AP News
articles.description: An Australian mother of four has been held in custody after she appeared in a court charged with traveling to Syria and joining the Islamic State group. Police say the 34-year-old Rayann El Houli was arrested at her Melbourne home Thursday. The arrest came ei…
articles.content:
MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) An Australian mother of four was held in custody after she appeared in a court on Thursday charged with traveling to Syria and joining the Islamic State group.
